methodsAttempted.query: site:unb.br inteligencia artificial generativa politica autores pareceristas UnB
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl was not available as a callable tool in this worker; official-domain web search returned UnB-hosted journal policy pages.
Found policy-specific pages under the official Portal de Periodicos da UnB.
robots.txt allowed crawling for all user agents; selected publicly accessible journal policy pages with substantive generative AI guidance.

artifacts.summary: Discovery found no central university-wide generative AI policy page in the checked results, but did find official UnB-hosted journal/editorial pages with policy-specific AI guidance. Claims are scoped to those official pages.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas

Sobre a Revista | Sociedade e Estado

artifacts.claimText: The UnB-hosted Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas allows generative AI for brainstorming and language improvement, but requires authors to clearly disclose any generative AI use with tool, version, use, and reason information in submission editor notes.

citation.citationTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: O uso de ferramentas de IA generativa é permitido como uma técnica para estimular a criatividade (brainstorming) e aprimoramento linguístico, desde que os padrões editoriais da Revista sejam respeitados. Qualquer uso de IA generativa deve ser claramente divulgado no momento da citação: Indique o nome completo da ferramenta, sua versão, como ela é usada e o motivo de seu uso.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Generative AI may be used for brainstorming and language improvement if journal standards are respected; any use must be clearly disclosed with tool name, version, use, and reason.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Politica para o uso de IA Generativa para autoras e autores da REPAM
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow journal-level claim; evidence directly states permitted uses and disclosure requirements.

artifacts.claimText: The UnB-hosted Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas states that generative AI cannot be considered an author, and that only a natural person can take responsibility for and sign the submitted contribution.

citation.citationTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: As autoras e autores devem revisar e validar todo o conteúdo gerado ou assistido por IA para garantir sua precisão e conformidade com os requisitos científicos e editoriais. A IA generativa não pode, em hipótese alguma, ser considerada autora. Somente uma pessoa física pode assumir a responsabilidade pelo conteúdo submetido e assinar a contribuição.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Authors must review and validate AI-generated or AI-assisted content; generative AI cannot be considered an author, and a natural person must take responsibility.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow journal authorship and responsibility claim directly supported by the source.

artifacts.claimText: The UnB-hosted Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas instructs reviewers not to use generative AI to analyze or summarize submitted articles, and prohibits importing unpublished manuscripts, proposals, files, images, or related information into generative AI tools.

citation.citationTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sobre a Revista | Revista de Estudos e Pesquisas sobre as Americas
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: As(os) pareceristas não devem usar IA generativa para analisar ou resumir artigos submetidos, ou mesmo trechos dos mesmos, como parte de suas revisões. É proibido importar manuscritos não publicados, propostas de projetos ou quaisquer arquivos, imagens ou informações associados para ferramentas de IA generativa.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Reviewers should not use generative AI to analyze or summarize submissions, and importing unpublished manuscripts or associated files into generative AI tools is prohibited.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Politica para o uso de IA generativa por pareceristas da REPAM
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The UnB-hosted journal Sociedade e Estado says it does not currently use AI resources in publication evaluation and editing, and tells authors that any material or content generated by an AI application should be reported in the abstract and methods section or equivalent.

citation.citationTitle: Sobre a Revista | Sociedade e Estado
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Sobre a Revista | Sociedade e Estado
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Apesar de estudar possíveis formas de adoção, até o presente momento, a S&E não utiliza recursos de IA em seu processo de avaliação e editoração de publicações. Recomenda, no entanto, que os autores e pareceristas sigam as orientações do Guia de uso de ferramentas e recursos de Inteligência Artificial na comunicação de pesquisas na Rede SciELO. Todo e qualquer uso ou conteúdo gerado por uma aplicação de IA deve ser informado no resumo e na seção métodos ou equivalente.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: S&E says it does not currently use AI resources in evaluation/editing, recommends SciELO AI guidance, and says AI-generated content should be reported in the abstract and methods or equivalent section.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Adocao de softwares uso de recursos de Inteligencia Artificial
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a journal-level claim covering current editorial AI use and author disclosure guidance.

artifacts.claimText: The UnB-hosted Anuario Antropologico author instructions state that the use and type of generative AI should be made explicit in submitted materials for evaluation when applicable, and recommend mentioning any AI-tool use in manuscript preparation.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: O uso e tipo de uso de Inteligência Artificial Generativa deve ser explicitada nas peças submetidas para avaliação, quando for o caso. Tal como explicitado no Guia de Uso de ferramentas e recursos de IA na comunicação de pesquisas na Rede Scielo, “ocultar o uso e conteúdo de IA é uma fala ética que viola os princípios de transparência e honestidade em pesquisa”. Assim, recomenda-se às auroras que mencionem todo e qualquer tipo de uso de ferramentas de IA na elaboração de seu manuscrito.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Use and type of generative AI should be explicit in submitted pieces when applicable; the page recommends mentioning any AI-tool use in manuscript preparation.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Instrucao aos Autores - integridade em publicacao cientifica
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow journal author-instructions claim; wording preserves the source's when-applicable scope.

artifacts.title: Universidade de Brasilia staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence for Universidade de Brasilia is limited to official UnB-hosted journal/editorial guidance pages. The run found substantive generative AI rules for authors and reviewers in REPAM, Sociedade e Estado, and Anuario Antropologico, but did not verify a central university-wide AI policy in this crawl.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are journal/editorial-source scoped and should not be read as university-wide student or faculty AI policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
